overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a wooden harbor dock in Saint Denis during golden hour. The character moves past the Saint Denis Riverboat Company building, warehouse structures, and approaches a large steamship, with warm sunlight creating atmospheric haze and long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock alongside riverboat company building

events.description: passing the corner of the green wooden building into a more open dock area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock past the Saint Denis Riverboat Company building

notable_agents.action: group of men in period clothing standing and conversing near the building entrance

entered.detail: green wooden building with white lettering and arched windows
stone building with wooden shutters adjacent to the riverboat company
small wooden boats docked along the pier
string of triangular flags hanging overhead across the dock
simple wooden bench along the dock railing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden harbor dock with the green Saint Denis Riverboat Company building dominating the center view. The camera moves forward past small wooden boats and decorative overhead flags, with NPCs in period clothing standing near the building entrance. The stone building with shutters remains visible on the left as the camera approaches the building corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered warehouse loading area on wooden dock

events.description: character walks past workers loading or organizing cargo near the warehouse

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock past the warehouse structure where workers are handling cargo

notable_agents.action: worker in suspenders bending over to handle wooden crates or cargo

entered.detail: open-sided wooden warehouse with gabled roof and support beams
stacks of wooden cargo crates and barrels under the warehouse cover

segments.scene_description: Moving past the riverboat company building, the scene transitions to a covered warehouse area with workers handling cargo. Wooden crates and barrels are stacked under the open-sided structure. The camera continues forward as the green building recedes behind, revealing more of the open dock ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock plaza with industrial gantry and ticket booth

events.description: sun becomes directly visible creating strong backlight and lens flare as the camera turns toward the water
approaching the large steamship moored at the end of the dock

agents.ego_description: walking through the open dock area toward the steamship, passing workers and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: worker sweeping the wooden dock planks with a broom

entered.detail: large industrial metal gantry structure with cables and hooks for loading ships
small wooden kiosk with windows and signage
large steamship with tall smokestacks moored at the dock

segments.scene_description: The dock opens into a wide plaza with a large metal gantry crane dominating the center. A wooden ticket booth stands on the right. The sun sits low and bright ahead, creating strong backlight and atmospheric haze. Workers sweep the deck and walk about as the camera approaches the massive steamship moored at the pier's end.

events.description: camera moves closer alongside the steamship hull, revealing details of the vessel's structure

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the steamship, observing the vessel's smokestacks and rigging

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the ship's railing, observing the water

entered.detail: tall black smokestacks with steam whistle fixtures on the steamship
wooden masts with extensive rope rigging extending upward from the vessel
upper deck cabins and railings of the steamship

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves alongside the massive steamship, with the camera passing close to the vessel's hull, smokestacks, and rigging. The sun creates a bright glare off the water and ship surfaces. The dock becomes narrower as it follows the ship's edge, with the wooden planks extending toward the vessel's stern.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling harbor dock that transitions from a riverside company hub into a wide, sun-drenched industrial plaza. It begins by moving past the green Saint Denis Riverboat Company building and its surrounding period NPCs, gliding under decorative flags and beside a shuttered stone structure. As the camera rounds the corner, the scene shifts into a covered warehouse area filled with stacked crates and barrels where workers handle cargo. The environment then opens into a wide plaza dominated by a large metal gantry crane and a wooden ticket booth, with the low sun creating a bright, atmospheric haze. Finally, the camera moves alongside the massive hull and smokestacks of a moored steamship, following the narrowing wooden planks of the pier toward the vessel's stern under a brilliant golden glare.
